summary: We are in full execution mode for the New Chinese Playbook report and Asia Start campaign, with the Intelligent China program launch and Summer Davos press release as urgent priorities this week.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the New Chinese Playbook for Going Global report, a joint project with IE Business School targeting a mid-September launch at Tech in Asia and Tyson conferences in Singapore. This week, Felix must create the one-pager and confirm venue with Tyson, while the team translates the Chinese report and Julie identifies alumni case studies. Simultaneously, the Asia Start campaign launched on June 23 with two parallel routes (AI led by Joseph, traditional led by Daisy) and a Google Ads campaign running through October. The new Intelligent China program is also in motion, with Joseph finalizing the website and the team planning the SCM campaign; module one in Beijing is the initial focus. Urgent this week: finalize Professor Sun Tianshu's press release for Summer Davos (Tian Xuefang) and review Professor Li Wei's FT article for overlap with the report (Joseph). Additionally, Ira must rewrite Professor Zhu Yang's article and review Ouyang Hui's translation, while Kaylee and Xuan take turns posting academic seminars on the events page.

meetings.title: New Chinese Playbook Report Planning
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report with CKGSB on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, including op-eds, case studies, and launch events at Tech in Asia and Tyson conferences in Singapore.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Discussed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional), reviewed results, and introduced a new in-depth program 'Intelligent China' targeting foreigners, with a focus on module one in Beijing.

meetings.title: EU-China Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on EU-China relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in market operations.

actionItems.text: Create one-pager proposal for report structure and promotion plan
actionItems.detail: To show to president for approval.

actionItems.text: Translate bulk of Chinese report into English
actionItems.detail: For the main feature of the English report.

actionItems.text: Identify and translate relevant alumni case studies from WeChat accounts
Confirm with Tyson if report can be launched at Tech in Asia event
actionItems.detail: Meeting with Tyson tomorrow to discuss theme and launch possibility.

actionItems.text: Start Asia Start campaign with two routes for first month
actionItems.detail: Daisy to execute traditional strategy, Joseph to use AI approach.

actionItems.text: Get website for Intelligent China program ready
actionItems.detail: Joseph to work with team to finalize the webpage.

actionItems.text: Plan SCM campaign for Intelligent China program
actionItems.detail: Decide on campaign approach (AI or traditional) after webpage is done.

actionItems.text: Finalize the rewrite of Professor Zhu Yang's article on 'Disruptive Timing' paper, double-checking against the Chinese near-final draft.
actionItems.meetingTitle: FW: News Article on 'Disruptive Timing' Paper
actionItems.detail: Ira sent a rewrite and will finalize after checking against the Chinese draft.

actionItems.text: Send the press release about Professor Sun Tianshu at Summer Davos to Prof Sun for confirmation, and also send it via WeChat.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: press release - Sun Tianshu at Summer Davos 2026
actionItems.detail: Julie will email Prof Sun and asked Ira to send via WeChat.

actionItems.text: Review the translation of Professor Ouyang Hui's article 'The Resilience Code' and decide if it's suitable for Knowledge.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: Translation: Ouyang Hui — The Resilience Code
actionItems.detail: Ira will review the translation and revert.

actionItems.text: Take turns publishing academic seminars on the English website's events section.
actionItems.meetingTitle: FW: publishing academic seminars on website
actionItems.detail: Ira assigned Kaylee and Xuan to publish academic seminars going forward.

actionItems.text: Check Professor Li Wei's FT Chinese article for overlap with his China Going Global report and consider translation.
actionItems.meetingTitle: RE: 长江商学院媒体监测日报2026-6-25
actionItems.detail: Joseph will review the article and assess if it's worth translating.

actionItems.text: Translate Professor Li Wei's FT Chinese article if it is substantially different.
actionItems.meetingTitle: Re: 长江商学院媒体监测日报2026-6-25
actionItems.detail: Joseph offered to translate the article.

actionItems.text: Review the final version of the press release for Sun Tianshu at Summer Davos.
actionItems.meetingTitle: RE: press release - Sun Tianshu at Summer Davos 2026
actionItems.detail: Joseph will review the final version after Ira's edits.

decisions.text: Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE Business School.
Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
Report will include main research from Professor Leeway, op-eds from President Santiago and Dean Hi How, and industry case studies.
Target launch at Singapore events in mid-September (Tech in Asia and Tyson).
Asia Start campaign will run two parallel routes for the first month: AI (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
Intelligent China program will focus on module one (Beijing) initially, with option to buy modules separately.
Use the new dashboard link: https://dashboard.crmckgsb.com/
Google Ads campaign for Asia Start launched on June 23 and will run through October 23.
decisions.meetingTitle: Asia Start — Google Ads Campaign Now Live
